title: Environmental assessment and evidence: Southern North Sea and Channel skates and rays fisheries management plan (FMP)
body: "The strategic environmental assessment (SEA) evaluates the potential positive and negative environmental effects of the proposed policies in the Southern North Sea and Channel skates and rays FMP.   This environmental report sets out the findings of the SEA.   You can also read the non-technical summary of the report.   Read more about fisheries management plans. "
